report.headline: Conduction Disturbance Detected
report.summary: Prolonged or aberrant QRS morphology detected, consistent with bundle branch block or intraventricular conduction delay. The model's attention spans the full QRS width, reflecting sensitivity to its temporal extent.
report.disclaimer: This output is generated by a research model trained on the PTB-XL dataset. It is not validated for clinical use and must not be used for diagnosis or treatment decisions.
